tagline: Access meeting recordings, transcripts, and AI-generated summaries

install.notes: Transport from source catalog: Streamable HTTP. Auth from source catalog: Fathom auth not parsed from public registry entry. Official MCP registry latest entry uses ai.fathom.api/mcp and api.fathom.ai domain.
